name: RABBIT-FILE-BUG-2
title: Work Protocol has two steps numbered 4 — conditional branches not labeled as 4a/4b
description: In SKILL.md Work Protocol, the two conditional branches after the user-decision gate are both labeled as step 4: '4. If user chooses to close without work' and '4. If user confirms to proceed'. They should be labeled 4a and 4b (or restructured) so the numbering is unambiguous. Currently reads as duplicate step 4 with no step 5.

history.note: Cannot reproduce: SKILL.md Work Protocol already shows distinct steps 4 and 5 (not duplicate step 4). The fix was already applied. Verified 2026-05-17 at line 109 and 117 of SKILL.md.
